The Spatial App on the Meta Quest 3 is one of the most exciting experiences I’ve tried so far. I love the way apps can be created and launched directly through the browser, and the seamless iCloud integration makes navigation smoother and more convenient than the default Meta Quest interface. The multi-window setup also deserves praise — it’s more productive and visually polished than MetaOS, making daily use feel fresh and efficient.
That said, the app still struggles in some important areas. Settings often reset back to default on their own, which can be frustrating, and performance drops are especially noticeable during video playback. The built-in browser is also limited, with no compatibility for popular 
apps like Spotify, which restricts its potential as a full workspace replacement.
Despite these issues, I use Spatial every day because its core ideas are brilliant and clearly ahead of what MetaOS currently offers. I just wish updates came more frequently, with expanded configuration options and long-promised features that have been “coming soon” for far too long. With more polish and consistency, Spatial has the potential to become the ultimate productivity app for VR.
Please add the lighting effect similar to the spatial tv app. That would be great
Start the app and nothing happens. Waste of time.

Sure, you can watch stuff on it but some of the things say browser is out of date so you cannot sign in so I would recommend the developers to update the browser but other than that, it’s basically just an iPhone

I got this app thinking it would be better for me in the long run but the more I use it the more I hate it. Now being honest I wanted to like it I really did but It’s completely pointless to have this app when my Quest 3 does everything the app does already. It’s buggy and if I could get a refund I would!!! Some of the Apple apps are ok but as soon as you close the app it logs you out so you have to log back in every time you open the app which is frustrating.

I paid to see what it was like. Well interesting app but needs work and other reviews say devs aren't doing much. My issue it doesn't save any of your settings and acts like a direct short to your battery. If you watch one YouTube video have a battery pack ready. I'm uninstalling it until there are some updates then will reavaluate. I don't recommend this app now.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! Let us address your concerns:
The app is continously being worked on with an aim for monthly updates. Settings can be saved, to address it please reinstall your app. It can be a battery drain if multiple windows are open, unfortunatelly it is an issue across all third party immersive browsers.
Don't worry, we're updating our app with updates and bug fixes as fast as we can.

reviews.review_description: Majority of apps complain the browser is out of date and it won't work. Also really slow at loading. So basically is a defective, almost useless app that could have been great. How about a decent browser.. is it that hard!!??

developer_response.body: Hey! Yes, it's really challenging. We are actively working on improving the browser! Will update the community trough discord with every new development!

reviews.review_title: I need a refund this app sucks

reviews.review_title: Things the developer needs to know
reviews.review_description: This is nothing like Apple. I have to keep signing in all the time.  I’ve tried two times today and I can’t get in. Your Apple TV app won’t even let me watch my Payed content any way. Fix it so that we don’t have to sign in every time. ￼

developer_response.body:
Hi there! Sorry to hear that our app didn't fit your expectations. Our intention is to give you the closest feeling to an Apple Quality that our team of 2 can achive with the power of the Meta Quest 3.

As stated in our product page, our app works with webapps, thus some experiences like Apple TV relies on the web version of Apple TV+ which doesn't let you play Itunes media. This is a limitation we can never overcome.

As for signing in, we haven't encountered this issue before. Can you let us know in detail through our Discord group? You can sign up from our website thespatial.app

reviews.review_title: The Spatial App is Pure Magic!
reviews.review_description:
We just have to say… WOW. The Spatial App has truly transformed our daily VR experience. What started as a promising concept has evolved into a polished, powerful, and incredibly immersive tool that we now use every single day. Whether we’re watching movies in stunning cinema mode, placing web apps all around our space for productivity, or simply vibing in a chill ambient environment, this app nails it on all fronts.

The improvements over the last few months have been insane. Everything is smoother, snappier, more intuitive—and let’s be honest—it’s giving Apple Vision a serious run for its money. The UI is sleek, the environments are breathtaking, and the ability to cast, multitask, and customize our digital workspace feels like the future has finally arrived.

We love how we can switch between relaxing movie nights (Disney+, Prime, YouTube—yes please!) and full-on productivity sessions with virtual monitors, widgets, and custom web apps. It’s like having a digital spaceship cockpit tailored to your vibe.

Honestly, this app is THE reason we keep coming back to our Quest headset. It’s not just a utility—it’s an experience. Meta, take a bow. The Spatial App is our new favorite companion in the VR universe.

developer_response.body: We cannot thank you enough for this review! We will bring more updates and cool features so you have something new to keep coming back to.

reviews.review_title: An amazing, great and highly promising a
reviews.review_description:
The first time I saw this application, it directly ignited my greatest initial intention for purchasing the quest3 - a budget alternative to the Apple vision pro
You know, most of us can't afford Apple's vision pro. So I want to simulate and achieve a similar effect through some third-party software.
First, I hope that most of the frames can have the texture of frosted glass like vision pro.
Secondly, I hope to add an app store similar to one, and be able to customize the software layout of the software bar and the software I need. If it's rather difficult to implement, I think we can first create a replacement version. For instance, we can establish a link to the existing software on the device and open it directly. This is actually a good alternative solution.
Thirdly, immersive environments can have more realistic elements or add customizable sky boxes that allow users to achieve their own customization
Fourth, it is hoped that the spatial video in the album application can be optimized to approach the ui interface like vision pro
If the above functions can be updated or a budget version solution can be adopted, then this software will enable quest3 to experience 99% of the functions of vision pro at one-tenth of the price. Zhejiang is destined to be a great project. Science and technology are not aloof; they serve the people! Come on, developers!

The UI is really clean and so are the windows. The sticky notes, clock ect are a nice touch and the new environments seems really sharp and nice. I surprise myself on how much i use this app than the main quest windows. I was able to get it on sale for 7 which is even better.

It is a really cool application, if you shearch something I tested many others applications but this one is the best with not the more active community but you still have one and they trie their best to develop the app because it is an alpha app and they are always adding uptades like the latest one is adding different lights in function of your videos when your are in cinema mode because yes their is one. So it is a bit expensive but still definitely worth the price for an OS like that.😊

reviews.review_title: Meta Backup bug and constant loading
reviews.review_description: The app is really cool! I liked it. But the issue with backup bug really got me and I deleted it. Hope developers will fix it, it’s really annoying. When you first download app, and without using it you go to settings and do the backup in Meta Quest cloud – than backup is ok. It works out just fine. And you can after turn off your headset without troubles. But if you actually used the app and you opened several apps within it and logged in, when you exit it and want to make backup of the app you face trouble. It crushes and writes that “The backup for the Spatial App was too large and could not be uploaded”. But there actually only 11,6 kB! You think ok, fine, I can live without backup, and go to turn off your headset. But no! When you turn off the headset it writes that the updates for your apps are currently downloading and you can’t turn off your headset (you can force it though anyway, but the problem with notification stays). And so I tried to leave my headset for a whole day so it could upload this miserable update (that actually backup) for the Spatial App, but it never worked. It was lasting forever, just bug. It stuck. I tried to reload and other many stuff but it didn’t fix the problem. I was delaying app three times and downloading it back, and every time the same thing. But as soon as I delete app —  the problem miraculously solves and I can turn off the headset like before without it stopping me and saying that “updates are currently trying to be uploaded”. The problem was exactly in this app (when you already worked within it and did some log ins in provided apps and services, if not – it’s fine), not others. So yeah the app really conflicts with Meta backup stuff (at least for me,  I persistently were trying to fix it, because I liked the app so much, but unfortunately I didn’t succeed).

All I get is a blank screen and a white thingy around my fingers. Doesn’t appear to do anything at all. I can’t even exit the app. 

Useless.
Apple TV does not let me view my library and I hope we get iOS 26 update. Love everything else about the app.

UPDATE: 02/17/25. The latest update is pretty good. The app seems snappier and more responsive . Many fixes to app issues. Can’t wait until we receive new apps, widgets, and or features. All I’ve ever asked for was timely progression and they seem to be on the right track. Thanks developers. It’s appreciated.


UPDATE: 02/05/2025.  ￼It may be time to cut m￼y losses with this app. ￼When I first bought my Quest this and 5 or 6 o￼ther productivity apps were my first downloads. At the time, this was one of the most impressive apps I’ve ever tried and thought bad reviews weren’t being fair . After all, it was only $10. Now, 6 or 7 months later, this app performs the worst of all those original apps. The other app teams not only implement updates to fix issues but also add new features . Somehow, nothing has seemingly improved on this app. Only promises. I’m not mad but beyond disappointed. I’ll probably just uninstall it so I don’t waste my time opening it to check for updates. Dang. This sux.

UPDATE: 01/12/2025.  I know things take time and seen one of the developers mentioned they are working on the next update and haven't forgotten about us.  That said,  I can't get my bluetooth keyboard to work with this app.  Never has.  I want this to be my go-to app SOOOOO bad but it lacks a some key features.  That said, Rome wasn't built in a day and I'm rooting for you to make this the best app on the Meta Q3.

I really enjoy this app and for $10, I think it’s awesome. The only thing I hope gets added is the ability to add or take away apps. Some of the apps on it I don’t use and wish I could replace them with other ones. Also, it’ll be nice to rearrange apps to your liking.

When I first bought this app, I was disappointed in the multiple bugs it had; however, since then, it has improved a lot. A good amount of small bugs have also been fixed, and the app does work very well; however, I do have feedback for the devs. For some reason, when you click the search button on the side of the Disney+ app, it takes you to a “page not found” screen, but besides that, it works really well. It would be nice to have some more customization, maybe allow people to re-arrange apps. It would also be nice if there was an App Store, where people could toggle on and off what supported apps they want on their Home Screen, so there would not be any unused apps cluttering the Home Screen. However, I do fell that this is a very useful app, and besides more customization and one or two bug fixes, the app is almost perfect.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for your feedback. We added the bug to our list, and the re-arrange is on our roadmap! If you want to get casual development updates join our discord server!

reviews.review_title: It’s excellent but could be better!
reviews.review_description:
I was skeptical when I purchased this because Meta is already pushing their user interface to be more like Apple interface. Meta demonstrated their plans at last year’s conference; long before Apple’s was introduced to the world. This app holds a huge amount of potential as it currently works pretty well and is currently a home run but it has its bugs. I’m guessing it will get better as long as we, the users, report bugs as we see them and make recommendations for enhancements.

Personally, I loved that I could open up multiple windows, put up a lot of google windows (email, photos, YouTube), close the app, re open it and see everything in its place again! Bravo!!!

I would like to see the browser support all major streaming apps... And/Or I would like to be able to use Meta’s browse because it already supports Netflix, HBO Max, Airlines in house movies and much more. The Google browser is nice but I wasn’t able to log into Netflix so it clearly has a ways to go.

Probably the best feature of this app is its persistence. Setup a bunch of windows, close the app, re open it and everything returns to where you had them… Bravo!!! Meta doesn’t have that!!! Personally, I would love to be able to name my setup, save multiple configurations and re load from a list, but I’m very happy having at least one persistent interface!!! 

I’m hopeful development will continue and I will be recommending to friends.

P.S. The interface is so immersive that I was starting to worry about how much time I was spending in it. After a bit of digging I finally realized that the app has widgets with both a clock and a timer widget so I planted one of each within my field of view. Bravo again!!! Very nice attention to detail and your users’ needs! 

P.S.2 I was happy to see Twitch as an option, I was able to use Twitch, but I wasn’t able to log into my account. Hopefully the developers test all apps by logging out and logging back in (manually not via save) because users should be able to log into anything you include in your interface.

P.S.3 After playing with the app a bit I realized that I’d like to be able to rotate my view to place a different screen in front of me. I eventually realized that sliding the thumb stick to the left did exactly that. Unfortunately, it jumps 45 degrees at a time, this amount isn’t user configurable and there isn’t a slide right to counter it (so a full 360 takes 8 clicks). I would really like a finer amount of control (perhaps a drag or user defined) and the ability to adjust in either direction. Regardless, this is a great feature and a good start!

Glitched and crashed often for me. I was hoping for an experience like what I had with Apple Vision Pro and it wasn't even close. I love my Quest 3, but I didn't need this App and wish I hadn't purchased it!

Other than that, it’s good work honestly. I love the app.

This is the first productivity app that behaves in a really fluid and intuitive way. All other competitors out there are janky and just not beautiful to look at - while spatial basically brings the Apple Vision Pro feeling to your Quest.

I'm using this almost daily for work. I'm hoping for more supported apps (like Slack or Discord) but what you don't have natively, you can just open in the browser. I can't wait to see where this app evolves in the future.

The Spatial App has exceeded my expectations in several key areas. Here is the run down;

User Interface (UI): The Ul is solid, intuitive, and user-friendly. It's easy to navigate, very smooth and responsive.

Flexibility: One of the standout features is the flexibility and customization. The app allows extensive customization, spatial anchoring and persistence of different apps and widgets enabling for specific needs and preferences to be met.

Visuals: The animations of icons, apps and widgets are exceptionally clear and vivid! Every detail is rendered beautifully, which enhances the overall aesthetic and premium feel it gives.

Widgets: The inclusion of widgets was a huge delightful surprise! They make essential information readily available at a glance.

The Spatial App on Quest 3 is a powerful tool that combines a robust Ul, vivid animations, and a high degree of customizability, making it a must-have for Quest 3 users. 

Aspects needing improvements: 
- Keyboard voice type support
- Browser folders for organizing marked pages
- Twitch App didn't work at all
- Support curved screens
- More menu customization 
- More widgets
- Smoother video streaming for movie and TV show apps
- Listening to audio via Bluetooth headsets produce popping sounds
Thanks. Should be baked into the os.  Could a function be added to save the desktop layout, widgets and open apps for the next visit?
Would love to see this in my custom homes!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  Please add this feature!!!!!

If we say that the Meta Quest3 has 60% of the experience of Vision Pro in spatial computing, then this app pushes it to 70%.

It doesn't have gesture tracking for now, but I hope this will happen in the next version. The window positioning is still a little buggy when you are walking in the room.

It’s a really great app for me. Keep onward ;)

reviews.review_title: Can't wait to see what's next!
reviews.review_description: Really loving this app so far! I love filling my entire room with all of my favorite go-to apps so I can have instant access to them. This is a game changer.

I feel like I wasted my money.

I appreciate the developers' attempt, but this application will never provide the same experience as the AVPs.

On Apple TV I cannot change the language of the movie, nor the subtitles. Yes, it is possible to do it in the Disney+ application. But the experience is very limited, it is displayed as in a browser. The same happens with Apple Music, or with the Photos app.
Good app, but baterry % very fast down, uff )
Waste of money, won’t even start. Shows start up logo and nothing after that.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! For the first launch you should be seeing our tutorial. We will check what the issue can be here, and fix it as soon as possible! Nothing works when you click the A button ? For quick responses reach out to us on our Discord!

reviews.review_description:
Love the potential there, but some missing features make it less than ideal 
the absence of a windows remote desktop is honestly the biggest let down so far, but also the limited app pool (no webapps, just an handful preset in the app itself) and the missing hand occlusion, left controller interaction on the keyboard and hand controls for the screens are pretty big issues so far, nothing that the devs can't fix in the future toh so I'm more than happy to support this!

The app works fairly well most of the time but it can be a bit slow, laggy and buggy. The “apps” are cool but held back by the fact that they are really just websites. I do think this app has a lot of potential but it’s not there yet
It’s not responding to open the applications!

developer_response.body: Hi! We released an update that should fix this issue! If you restart your application it should work fine!

reviews.review_title: Quest is the better headset, period
reviews.review_description: Spatial away we go!

Right handed control, really? We need to be able to choose between the left and right hand at the very least 😏

That app is just a browser, nothing quite different from Reality Browser...

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are already working on the primary hand switch, and we will release it as soon as possible.
